headline: Woman's 'I'm Just A Simple Girl' Is Code For 'I Have 47 Unread Emails And No System'
summary: Her inbox is chaos. Her life is chaos. 'It's a vibe,' she says. The vibe is 'overwhelmed.'
fullBody: Amanda Simple claims she's 'low maintenance.' Her inbox has 47,000 unread emails. 'I'll get to them,' Amanda said. She won't. Her life is 'organized chaos' — which means 'not organized at all.' 'I'm spontaneous,' Amanda said. Spontaneous means 'forgot to pay bills.' Her friends have offered to help. 'I have a system,' Amanda said. The system is 'ignore and hope.' It's not working.
